hero.name: Vishnu Vardhan Rali
hero.title: Full Stack Developer
hero.bio: Passionate Full Stack Developer with real-world internship experience, 7+ IBM certifications, and a drive to build products that matter. Seeking full-time developer roles in 2026.

experience.company: Full Stack Development Program · Khammam, India
experience.description: Built and deployed full stack web applications using modern technologies. Designed responsive UIs, developed backend REST APIs, and connected databases. Worked in a team environment following industry-standard development practices.
